tasks.label: verify-b1-root-route
args: Set-Location 'd:\sabicore-assessment\B1'; node --check index.js; $job = Start-Job -ScriptBlock { Set-Location 'd:\sabicore-assessment\B1'; node index.js }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; try { $resp = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing http://localhost:3000/; Write-Output ('STATUS=' + $resp.StatusCode); Write-Output ('BODY=' + $resp.Content) } finally { Stop-Job $job -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Job $job -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }
